classified_targets.name: CODEX
classified_targets.install_text: Copy this folder into your Codex skills directory.

classified_targets.name: MiniMaxCode
classified_targets.install_text: For local MiniMax Code / Mavis installs, copy `skills/engineering-calculation-system/` to `%USERPROFILE%/.mavis/skills/engineering-calculation-system/`, then restart MiniMax Code or verify with `mavis skill list`. For sharing or marketplace-style import, publish the unzipped archive as a Github repository root and use Skills -> Create -> Import from Github. The repository skill entry is `skills/engineering-calculation-system/SKILL.md`.
notes: This package follows the MiniMax Skills repository layout: `skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`.
Local user-skill install root observed on Windows MiniMax Code / Mavis builds: `%USERPROFILE%/.mavis/skills/`.
If `mavis skill list` reports a different `agent_skills_dir` or user skill root, copy the folder to that reported root instead.
For Github import, publish the unzipped archive contents as the repository root rather than uploading the zip file itself.

classified_targets.name: QODER
classified_targets.install_text: Upload this zip directly from QODER's Skills / Install Skill flow. This is the direct skill/resource entrypoint; for Qoder Smart Agent workflows, prefer the QODER Project package so the custom agent and supporting skill resources are installed together.
notes: This archive places SKILL.md at the zip root for QODER skill import compatibility.
For web-complete generation, prefer the QODER Project package because it includes the core skill, templates, schemas, validator, project scaffold, and .qoder overlay.
If only this direct skill is installed, it is a lightweight entrypoint, not the complete project template.
Qoder Smart Agent mode should use `.qoder/agents/engineering-calc-system.md` as the supervisor and keep long references outside `.qoder/agents/`.
Multiple Qoder worker agents are packaged by the QODER Project archive, not by the direct Skill archive.

classified_targets.name: QODER Project
classified_targets.install_text: Copy the contents of this folder into the root of the QODER project.
notes: This directory already merges the core skill, shared adapter docs, and `.qoder/` files.

Recommended Qoder architecture: `.qoder/agents/engineering-calc-system.md` is the Smart Agent supervisor; `.qoder/agents/engineering-calc-*.md` are delegated worker agents; `.qoder/skills/engineering-calc-system/` is the skill/resource layer; `.qoder/references/` stores long references so they are not listed as disabled agents.
A single `python tools/build_release.py` run packages the full Qoder multi-agent program into the QODER Project archive.
From a source checkout, `python tools/install_qoder_user.py --build` syncs the packaged Qoder overlay into `QODER_HOME` or `~/.qoder` and verifies all worker agents.
Use `python tools/install_qoder_user.py --audit` to detect missing or redundant managed Qoder files, and `python tools/install_qoder_user.py --uninstall` to remove only this package's Qoder files.

classified_targets.name: TRAE
classified_targets.install_text: Copy the contents of this folder into the root of the TRAE project.
notes: This directory already merges the core skill, shared adapter docs, and `.trae/` files.

classified_targets.name: OpenCode
classified_targets.install_text: Copy the contents of this folder into the root of the OpenCode project.

classified_targets.name: AGENTS Generic
classified_targets.install_text: Copy the contents of this folder into an AGENTS.md-compatible project root.
